creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
The commit log should also have referenced this PR.  In any case, the update was committed.

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=dff10069f4bfc0fe6ad772ff075acd0cbda004d7

I'll close this, but please investigate the linking issue.  Unless there is some unwanted configuration pulling in those dependencies, I think it's clear that they are needed in LIB_DEPENDS.
